problem_solved: Clinical documentation burden reduces provider efficiency and contributes to burnout
solution_description: AI medical scribe that automatically generates clinical notes from patient consultations. Offers customizable templates, multi-specialty support, and EHR integration. Competes with DeepScribe and PatientNotes in the AI scribing market
traction_signals: Growing presence in US and Australian markets
notes: Australian-origin AI scribe with US expansion. Strong competitor to DeepScribe and Abridge in certain markets. May have different regulatory approach given AU origins
